infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Qualified Commercial uses your camera to scan HUD-1s, closing docs, and property photos for upload to your investor profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Qualified Commercial reads your photo library so you can pick existing closing docs and property images to upload to your loan files.

plugins.cameraPermission: Qualified Commercial uses your camera to scan HUD-1s, closing docs, and property photos.
plugins.photosPermission: Qualified Commercial reads your photo library so you can pick existing closing docs and property images.
